title: BEM-826 execute repair
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 22:28 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
route=load('governance/state/bem825_route_after_bem824_smoke.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
rtxt=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
ptxt=proc.read_text(errors='ignore') if proc.exists() else ''
queue=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json')
results=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
marker=load('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json')
if rs=='repair_dispatch_results_first':
    if results:
        status='dispatch_results_already_exist'
        next_action='parse dispatch results and continue smoke'
    elif marker.get('status'):
        status='processor_runs_no_results'
        next_action='patch shell processor result-writing path because marker exists but no result files'
    elif 'scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh' in rtxt:
        status='processor_step_present_but_marker_missing'
        next_action='fix codex-runner step placement/lint so processor executes'
    else:
        status='processor_step_missing'
        next_action='install processor step in codex-runner'
elif rs=='repair_runtime_state_first':
    status='runtime_state_repair_needed'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher runtime state writer'
elif rs=='repair_real_response_first':
    status='real_response_repair_needed'
    next_action='patch Claude prompt/provider response creation'
else:
    status='unknown_route'
    next_action='diagnose route '+rs
state={'bem':'BEM-826','status':status,'route_status':rs,'queue_count':len(queue),'result_count':len(results),'marker_status':marker.get('status'),'runner_has_processor':'scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh' in rtxt,'processor_exists':proc.exists(),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem826_execute_bem825_repair.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem826_execute_bem825_repair.md').write_text('# BEM-826 | Execute BEM-825 Repair | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem826_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-826'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem826_execute_bem825_repair.json','governance/reports/bem826_execute_bem825_repair.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem826_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-825 repair route by inspecting queue, results, processor marker, runner processor step and processor script')
"""
